decks.notes: The key concept of this deck is to quickly and efficiently cheat large creatures, such as Emrakul, the Aeons Torn, into play using cards like Sneak Attack and Show and Tell. This combo-focused deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats before they have a chance to respond, utilizing cards like Force of Will for protection and Brainstorm for card selection. With the ability to bring out game-ending creatures early in the game, this deck aims to win the match in a swift and decisive manner.

The deck focuses on utilizing creature cycling and cascade mechanics to quickly cycle through the deck and generate advantage. By manipulating the graveyard and utilizing cascade spells such as Violent Outburst, the deck can quickly bring back creatures from the graveyard and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures. The deck also includes counterspells and disruptive creatures like Brazen Borrower to protect its game plan and disrupt the opponent's strategy. With a mix of aggressive cycling and control elements, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and win the game before the opponent can react effectively.

This deck focuses on controlling the tempo of the game by using disruptive spells like Daze, Thoughtseize, and Force of Will to disrupt opponent's plans while deploying threats like Murktide Regent and Barrowgoyf to pressure the opponent. The deck also utilizes efficient removal spells such as Fatal Push and Snuff Out to keep the opponent's board in check. With a mix of disruptive elements and aggressive threats, this Dimir Tempo deck aims to outmaneuver opponents and come out on top in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

This Dimir Tempo deck aims to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy while applying pressure with efficient creatures. The deck utilizes versatile removal spells like Snuff Out and Fatal Push alongside disruption like Thoughtseize and Daze. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and allows for card selection to find key pieces. Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares serve as powerful threats that can quickly close out the game. The deck also includes counter magic in Force of Will and efficient card draw in Brainstorm to maintain tempo and stay ahead.

The primary strategy of this deck revolves around utilizing Aluren to cast creatures for free, particularly Atraxa, Grand Unifier, in order to enable powerful combos and win conditions such as Show and Tell into Omniscience or Emrakul, the Aeons Torn. The deck includes protection in the form of Force of Will and Veil of Summer, as well as card draw with Brainstorm and Ponder. Additionally, it includes mana acceleration with Lotus Petal and land tutors like Polluted Delta and Misty Rainforest. The deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with powerful plays.

This Legacy 1 vs 1 deck focuses on maintaining control through disruption and removal while also deploying powerful threats to end the game quickly. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Force of Will and Stifle, while using efficient removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Prismatic Ending to deal with threats. The deck also includes card draw and filtering with Brainstorm and Ponder, as well as powerful finishers like Murktide Regent and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and Consign to Memory offers additional versatility in disrupting the opponent's plans.

The main focus of this Dragon Stompy deck is to disrupt opponent's strategies and lock them out of the game by using cards like Chalice of the Void, Blood Moon, and City of Traitors. It also aims to ramp up quickly with Ancient Tomb and Simian Spirit Guide to drop powerful threats like Pyrogoyf and Broadside Bombardiers. The deck utilizes aggressive plays and efficient removal spells like Sundering Eruption and Fury to maintain board control and pressure the opponent. This deck's strategy revolves around fast and disruptive gameplay to overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own game plan.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly assemble and cast a series of spells in order to win the game as fast as possible. By using cards like Dark Ritual, Simian Spirit Guide, and Lotus Petal, the deck aims to consistently cast a spell that mills the entire deck, resulting in a win condition such as Thassa's Oracle or Dread Return with a combo piece like Balustrade Spy. The deck also includes disruption elements like Cabal Therapy and Pact of Negation to protect the combo.

This Dimir Tempo deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Wasteland, Hymn to Tourach, Thoughtseize, and Daze while maintaining pressure with efficient threats like Murktide Regent, Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student, Orcish Bowmasters, Kaito, Bane of Nightmares, and Barrowgoyf. The deck also includes removal spells like Snuff Out, Fatal Push, and Sink into Stupor to control the board. The key strategy is to tempo out the opponent by disrupting their resources and deploying threats quickly, ultimately overwhelming them to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive Eldrazi creatures while disrupting their game plan with cards like Chalice of the Void and Thought-Knot Seer. By utilizing powerful Eldrazi creatures like Reality Smasher and It That Heralds the End, this deck aims to quickly close out the game before the opponent has a chance to recover. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Wasteland and Ancient Tomb provide additional disruption and mana acceleration, giving this deck a strong and consistent aggressive strategy in the Legacy format.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature plays, disruption with cards like Cabal Therapy and Thoughtseize, and utilizing powerful synergy between cards like Orcish Bowmasters, Guide of Souls, and Ocelot Pride. The deck also features removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and uses Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory to pump up creatures and provide additional threats. The deck aims to pressure opponents quickly and efficiently while disrupting their game plan, ultimately overwhelming them with a combination of creatures and removal spells.

This deck aims to control the board through efficient removal and disrupt the opponent's game plan with hand disruption spells. It leverages tempo plays to keep the opponent on the back foot while applying pressure with aggressive creatures. The deck utilizes a combination of powerful threats like Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to close out the game quickly. With a mix of disruption, card advantage, and efficient threats, this deck aims to outmaneuver opponents and secure victory through calculated aggression.

This deck focuses on utilizing disruption and efficient threats to keep the opponent off balance while slowly chipping away at their life total. It aims to control the tempo of the game by combining aggressive plays with timely removal spells and disruptive counter magic. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student allows for card advantage and selection, while Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares provide powerful threats that can quickly close out the game. By disrupting the opponent's game plan and applying pressure, this deck aims to win before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck revolves around assembling a fast and powerful combo utilizing cards like Balustrade Spy and Undercity Informer to mill the entire library and put key pieces like Thassa's Oracle into play to win the game instantly. It is designed to be extremely aggressive and explosive, aiming to win as quickly as possible without relying on traditional creatures or lands. The deck utilizes a combination of mana acceleration and disruptive spells to ensure the combo can be executed smoothly and efficiently.

This deck aims to disrupt the opponent's mana base with cards like Blood Moon, Magus of the Moon, and Chalice of the Void while quickly deploying powerful threats such as Broadside Bombardiers and Hexing Squelcher. The goal is to lock down the opponent's resources and overwhelm them with aggressive creatures like Fury, all while utilizing fast mana acceleration from cards like Chrome Mox and City of Traitors. The deck's key strategy revolves around disrupting the opponent's game plan and quickly closing out the game with efficient creatures and burn spells.

The deck focuses on quickly reanimating powerful creatures such as Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Griselbrand using cards like Reanimate and Animate Dead. It utilizes cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to generate mana quickly, while also disrupting the opponent's hand with cards like Thoughtseize and Unmask. Show and Tell can be used to cheat out creatures early, while Collective Brutality and Cabal Therapy provide additional disruption. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its powerful creatures and disruptive spells, aiming for a quick victory.
